rulings.Case Title: ROBERT F. FLOOD VS. BESSEMER TRUST COMPANY, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION CONSUMERS LEGAL REMEDIES ACT (CLRA) SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE. DEMURRER TO 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION ORAL CONTRACT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE. DEMURRER TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE OVERRULED. DEMURRER TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY OVERRULED. DEMURRER TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION OVERRULED. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: LEVENSOHN CAPITAL MANAG LLC VS. FRANK M BROWN
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE. 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO ALLEGE WITH SPECIFICITY NATURE OF UNJUST ENRICHMENT. 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION PROMISSORY FRAUD OVERRULED. 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION DECEIT OVERRULED. 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION CONCEALMENT OVERRULED. 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE. 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO ALLEGE BASIS OF FIDUCIARY DUTY. 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION INTENTIONAL INTERFERENCE WITH PROSPECTIVE ECONOMIC ADVANTAGE AND 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENT INTERFERENCE WITH PROSPECTIVE ECONOMIC ADVANTAGE - SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE. 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION DECLARATORY RELIEF SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE. 11TH CAUSE OF ACTION SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE TREATED AS MOTION TO STRIKE AND GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: SHAO XIONG LUN VS. SHI HUA LUO et al
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER OVERRULED 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION AND SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION. 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE OF IMPLIED WARRANTY OF HABITABILITY SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE. 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENCE OVERRULED. 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION REAL PROPERTY SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE. 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENCE PER SE OVERRULED. 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE. 8TH, 9TH, 10TH CAUSES OF ACTION OVERRULED. 11TH CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO SPECIFY STATUTE (1951.3-WRONG). 12TH, 13TH, 14TH, 15TH, 16TH, 17TH, 18TH, 19TH, 20TH, AND 21ST CAUSES OF ACTION OVERRULED. MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION ATTORNEY'S FEES DENIED. GENERAL AND SPECIAL DAMAGES DENIED. 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION PUNITIVES DENIED, ATTORNEY FEES DENIED. 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE - MOOT. 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENCE PER SE DENIED. 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION - MOOT. 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION TREBLE DAMAGES, PUNITIVES - DENIED. 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION PUNITIVES DENIED. 11TH CAUSE OF ACTION - MOOT. 12TH CAUSE OF ACTION GRANTED. 13TH CAUSE OF ACTION 17200 DAMAGES GRANTED. 15TH CAUSE OF ACTION PUNITIVES DENIED. 16TH, 17TH, AND 18TH CAUSES OF ACTION PUNITIVES DENIED. 19TH, 2OTH, AND 21ST CAUSES OF ACTION DENIED. (PB)
